mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_mq_outbox (id, event_type, exchange, routing_key, payload, headers, status, next_retry_at, last_error, claimed_at, claimed_by, retry_count, version, created_at) VALUES (CAST(#{id} AS uuid), #{eventType}, #{exchange}, #{routingKey}, CAST(#{payload} AS jsonb), CAST(#{headers} AS jsonb), #{status}, #{nextRetryAt}, #{lastError}, #{claimedAt}, #{claimedBy}, #{retryCount}, #{version}, #{createdAt})
mapper.select: SELECT id, event_type, exchange, routing_key, payload::text AS payload, headers::text AS headers, status, next_retry_at, last_error, claimed_at, claimed_by, retry_count, version, created_at FROM t_mq_outbox WHERE retry_count < #{maxAttempts} AND ( (status = 'PENDING' AND next_retry_at <= #{now}) OR (status = 'CLAIMED' AND claimed_at IS NOT NULL AND claimed_at <= #{staleClaimBefore}) ) ORDER BY COALESCE(next_retry_at, claimed_at) ASC LIMIT #{limit} FOR UPDATE SKIP LOCKED
mapper.update: UPDATE t_mq_outbox SET status = 'CLAIMED', claimed_by = #{claimedBy}, claimed_at = #{claimedAt}, version = version + 1 WHERE id = CAST(#{id} AS uuid) AND version = #{expectedVersion}
UPDATE t_mq_outbox SET status = 'SENT', claimed_at = NULL, claimed_by = NULL, last_error = NULL, version = version + 1 WHERE id = CAST(#{id} AS uuid) AND version = #{expectedVersion}

UPDATE t_mq_outbox SET status = 'PENDING', last_error = #{lastError}, next_retry_at = #{nextRetryAt}, retry_count = #{newRetryCount}, claimed_at = NULL, claimed_by = NULL, version = version + 1 WHERE id = CAST(#{id} AS uuid) AND version = #{expectedVersion}

UPDATE t_mq_outbox SET status = 'FAILED', last_error = #{lastError}, retry_count = #{newRetryCount}, claimed_at = NULL, claimed_by = NULL, version = version + 1 WHERE id = CAST(#{id} AS uuid) AND version = #{expectedVersion}
